# Internship Report — Nguyen Tien Vuong

> Internship report for the First Cloud AI Journey (FCAJ) program at Amazon Web Services Vietnam, covering worklogs, proposal, translated blogs, event participation, an Upscale AI workshop on AWS, and a self-evaluation.

## Pages

- [Internship Report](/): Overview and student information.
- [Worklog](/1-worklog): Weekly progress log across the FCAJ program.
- [Proposal](/2-proposal): Upscale AI project proposal, architecture, and cost analysis.
- [Blogs](/3-blogsposted): Translated technical blogs on AWS architectures.
- [Events Participated](/4-eventparticipated): AWS events attended during the program.
- [Workshop](/5-workshop): Step-by-step workshop deploying Upscale AI on AWS (ALB, ECS on EC2, EFS, Redis).
- [Self-evaluation](/6-self-evaluation): Reflection on the internship outcomes.
- [Feedback](/7-feedback): Program feedback and suggestions.
